phases.title: Research competitor tools
phases.instructions: Search the web for top 5 alternatives to our CLI tool. Document each with name, URL, and key features. Save to docs/research/competitors.md.

phases.title: Compare feature matrices
phases.instructions: Create a comparison table in docs/research/feature-matrix.md covering: authentication, output formats, plugin support.

phases.title: Draft recommendation
phases.instructions: Write a 1-page recommendation in docs/research/recommendation.md summarizing our competitive position and suggested improvements.

constraints: Focus on publicly available information only

ground_truth_rationale: All three phases have non-empty instructions and shell-verifiable dod commands. Acceptance has a valid shell command. No invariant violations. Clear APPROVED.
